inputs.name: req_pool_indices
inputs.meaning: Indices mapping requests to token pools.
inputs.inference_role: Indicates which token pool each request will be assigned to.

inputs.name: req_to_token
inputs.meaning: Tensor that maps requests to their corresponding token representations.
inputs.inference_role: Provides the actual token representations for the requests.

inputs.name: start_offset
inputs.meaning: Offset for the beginning of tokens for each request in the cache.
inputs.inference_role: Determines where the current batch of tokens starts in the cache.

inputs.name: end_offset
inputs.meaning: Offset for the end of tokens for each request in the cache.
inputs.inference_role: Determines where the current batch of tokens ends in the cache.

inputs.name: out_cache_loc
inputs.meaning: Location in the cache where the output tokens will be stored.
inputs.inference_role: Specifies where the result tokens for requests will be written.

inputs.name: pool_len
inputs.meaning: Length of the token pool for each request.
inputs.inference_role: Indicates the maximum number of tokens that can be assigned to each request.

inputs.name: bs_upper
inputs.meaning: Upper bound for the batch size, rounded up to the next power of 2.
inputs.inference_role: Used for optimizing memory accesses during processing.

outputs.name: token_pool
outputs.meaning: Tensor that stores the output tokens assigned to the token pool.
outputs.inference_role: Contains the final tokens assigned to each request after processing.
